title: All-Stars Burlesque

venue_path.name: Just The Tonic at the Caves

full_description: The ultimate international burlesque extravaganza has returned due to high demand! A celebration of bodies, tradition and inclusivity by both award-winning, world-class artists and rising stars on the scene. This brand-new show pushes the boundaries of striptease one step further — prize winners from Europe's largest industry competition, the World Burlesque Games, alongside the hottest new names in the scene.
ai_summary: Edinburgh Fringe's premier burlesque showcase — award-winning performers from across Europe and beyond, celebrating body diversity and the full tradition of the form from classic fan dance to contemporary neo-burlesque. Performed in the Caves' ancient underground vaults.
